recommendationShare.title: Recommendation Share
recommendationShare.description: Share of AI recommendations mentioning this brand

benchmarks.title: Competitor Benchmarking
benchmarks.description: Side-by-side brand comparison within a market
benchmarks.noData: No benchmark data available for this market

citationSources.title: Citation Sources
citationSources.description: External websites cited by AI platforms alongside this brand

opportunities.title: Opportunity Discovery
opportunities.description: Prompts where your brand should appear but currently doesn't or is underrepresented
opportunities.noData: No opportunities found for this brand in this market

types.missingDescription: Your brand does not appear in this prompt but competitors do
types.weakDescription: Your brand appears but with fewer citations than the typical competitor

positions.title: Position Tracking
positions.description: Track where your brand appears in AI responses and monitor position changes over time
positions.noData: No position data available for this market
positions.firstMentionRateDescription: Percentage of responses where your brand is mentioned first
positions.topThreeRateDescription: Percentage of responses where your brand appears in the top 3
positions.distributionDescription: How often your brand appears at each position

trends.title: Trend Analysis
trends.description: Period-over-period trend analysis for AI visibility metrics
trends.noData: No trend data available for this selection
trends.insufficientData: Not enough data to compute trends

errors.promptSetRequired: A prompt set (market) is required to view recommendation share
errors.benchmarkPromptSetRequired: A prompt set (market) is required to view competitor benchmarks
errors.sentimentPromptSetRequired: A prompt set (market) is required to view sentiment data
errors.sourcesPromptSetRequired: A prompt set (market) is required to view citation sources
errors.opportunityPromptSetRequired: A prompt set (market) is required to view opportunities
errors.opportunityBrandRequired: A brand is required to view opportunities
errors.positionPromptSetRequired: A prompt set (market) is required to view position data
errors.trendsInvalidMetric: Invalid metric. Must be one of: recommendation_share, sentiment, average_position, first_mention_rate, citation_count, opportunity_count
errors.trendsBrandNotFound: Brand was not found in this workspace
errors.trendsPromptSetNotFound: Prompt set was not found in this workspace
errors.trendsInsufficientData: Not enough data to compute trend statistics
